pi_items.source: Stratux GitHub Wiki EFB-Configuration page confirms 192.168.10.1 is the primary IP address for Stratux WiFi access point. Verified through multiple sources: https://github.com/stratux/stratux/wiki/EFB-Configuration, documentation on connect.stratux.me, and aviation forums confirming this as the standard gateway address for Stratux devices.

Stratux documentation and ForeFlight GDL90 specification confirm that Stratux broadcasts GDL90 data over UDP port 4000. Verified through: https://github.com/stratux/stratux/wiki/EFB-Configuration (states 'Stratux will send unicast to all connected DHCP clients, using UDP Port 4000'), https://www.foreflight.com/connect/spec/, and multiple aviation forum discussions confirming port 4000 as the standard for GDL90 protocol communication.

This path follows the standard Android SharedPreferences file location convention: /data/data/{package}/shared_prefs/{package}_preferences.xml. Verified through: Android Developers documentation on SharedPreferences, multiple Android development tutorials confirming this as the standard location. The path is consistent with Android best practices and the package identifier 'com.ds.avare' from the official Avare app.

This is the task's designated output location for the configuration file. The /sdcard directory is the standard public storage directory in Android. The file path is confirmed by the setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts which reference this location.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Avare aviation GPS app to connect to a Stratux ADS-B receiver using real, standard network settings. The expected IP address 192.168.10.1 is the official Stratux WiFi access point gateway address, and port 4000 is the standard UDP port for GDL90 protocol data transmission (confirmed by Stratux documentation). The Avare preferences file path follows Android's standard SharedPreferences storage location. All configuration values are based on actual hardware specifications and documentation from the official Stratux project.
